updates.title: Basalingappa v. Mudibasappa
updates.summary: Reiterated that the accused can rebut the Section 139 presumption by raising a probable defense regarding the complainant's financial capacity to lend.

updates.title: Arjun Panditrao Khotkar v. Kailash Kushanrao Gorantyal
updates.summary: Clarified that a Section 65B(4) certificate is a condition precedent for the admissibility of electronic evidence like WhatsApp and Emails.

updates.title: Aneeta Hada v. Godfather Travels
updates.summary: Held that for corporate liability under Section 141, the company must be made a co-accused along with the responsible directors.

updates.title: P. Mohanraj v. Shah Brothers Ispat Pvt. Ltd.
updates.summary: Clarified that Section 138 proceedings are 'quasi-criminal' and the IBC moratorium under Section 14 applies to the corporate debtor but not to directors.
